title: Mechatronics Engineers
description: Research, design, develop, or test automation, intelligent systems, smart devices, or industrial systems control.

tasks.text: Create mechanical design documents for parts, assemblies, or finished products.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design advanced precision equipment for accurate or controlled applications.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design engineering systems for the automation of industrial tasks.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Implement or test design solutions.

tasks.text: Identify materials appropriate for mechatronic system designs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Research, select, or apply sensors, communication technologies, or control devices for motion control, position sensing, pressure sensing, or electronic communication.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Apply mechatronic or automated solutions to the transfer of materials, components, or finished goods.

tasks.text: Develop electronic, mechanical, or computerized processes to perform tasks in dangerous situations, such as underwater exploration or extraterrestrial mining.

tasks.text: Monitor or calibrate automated systems, industrial control systems, or system components to maximize efficiency of production.

tasks.text: Design self-monitoring mechanical systems, such as gear systems that monitor loading or condition of systems to detect and prevent failures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design or develop automated control systems for environmental applications, such as waste processing, air quality, or water quality systems.

tasks.text: Design, develop, or implement control circuits or algorithms for electromechanical or pneumatic devices or systems.

tasks.text: Design mechatronics components for computer-controlled products, such as cameras, video recorders, automobiles, or airplanes.
